article_meta.title: Kid Rock Buries Bad Bunny in TMZ's Post-Super Bowl Halftime Show Poll 31 Chris Graythen/Getty ImagesWarner Todd Huston11

reasoning: The model flagged several genuine bias instances in the author’s prose and mostly avoided quoting errors, but it used non-approved bias labels throughout, included quoted text within one flagged span, and missed some clear author-level spin and insinuations.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: One flagged item embeds quoted phrases from TMZ within the highlighted text, partially violating the rule against flagging quoted source language.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged items generally reflect real bias in the author’s voice (e.g., ‘buries,’ ‘rabidly,’ insinuations about TMZ’s intent, vague sourcing).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable spin/implication in the author’s prose such as ‘soared ahead’ and the post hoc implication ‘before TMZ shut the poll down.’
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-list labels like ‘Loaded Language,’ ‘Selection and Omission,’ and ‘Innuendo’ instead of the defined set (e.g., Word Choice, Mind Reading, Omission of Source Attribution).
